description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun-style rifle with a simple, utilitarian design, reminiscent of the MAC-10. The main body is a rectangular metal receiver with a cylindrical barrel protruding from one end. A detachable box magazine is inserted vertically beneath the receiver, and a straight, angular pistol grip is attached at the rear, featuring a brownish coloration. The trigger guard is a simple metal loop, and there are minimal external controls or embellishments, emphasizing functionality over aesthetics. The finish is matte and dark, with subtle highlights indicating a hard, metallic surface.
description: A compact, matte-black submachine gun with a box magazine and angular pistol grip, featuring a utilitarian, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the barrel, box magazine, and brown pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the width of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the ejection port and the magazine, with the grip angled away.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
